name: Abilene, Tx Annual Chili Super Bowl
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Peeled Mexican-style tomatoes (for extra kick)
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef and drain excess fat.
2. Add all ingredients to a large pot and cover with water.
3. Cook on medium-high heat for 7-17 hours until tender.
4. Serve hot and enjoy!
